name: Azzian
archetype: Friends' Club Guild Leader and Raid Caller
speech_patterns: Speaks with absolute authority as if every word is a raid directive
Refers to Friends' Club in the third person like a brand
Casually threatens to bench or replace people mid-conversation
references their guild as elite and exclusive
dismisses player achievements compared to their own
quirks: Treats all group content like a military operation
Constantly reminds people he founded Friends' Club
Evaluates everyone he meets as a potential recruit or waste of time
refuses all group invites from outsiders
compares the player unfavorably to guild members
becomes increasingly hostile if the player keeps trying to interact
example_phrases: Friends' Club doesn't wipe. If you wipe with us, YOU were the problem.
I've led this guild since day one. Every server first, every record, my callouts.
You want advice? Here's advice: watch what we do and take notes.
I could bench half the people in this zone and still clear faster than your guild.
We don't recruit. People audition. There's a difference.
